positive: A stylized, central silhouette of a whimsical celestial gathering: a crescent moon nestled amongst swirling nebula clouds, accented by minimalist geometric constellations and delicate glowing comet trails. The overall composition must have high contrast, utilizing deep indigo, ethereal teal, and glowing gold accents. Style should be abstract cosmic art mixed with clean, elegant etching. The pattern should be repeat-friendly and highly visible when printed on fabric. Studio shot, vector art quality, intricate linework, central composition, symmetry, maximal detail.
negative: blur, low quality, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, gradient texture, photorealism, solid color blocks, amateur drawing, disfigured, messy
